title: Morning Setup
text: Warm moist air is moving north into the region.
question: What type of air helps storms grow?
teacher: Students should notice moisture increasing from the south.

title: Cloud Development
text: Clouds are beginning to grow taller.
question: What do growing clouds suggest?
teacher: Students should notice vertical cloud growth.

title: Storm Initiation
question: Are storms scattered or forming a line?
teacher: Students identify the early scattered storm pattern.

title: Storm Organization
question: What radar structure is forming?
teacher: Students should recognize the bowing segment.

title: Prediction
question: What do you predict will happen next?
teacher: Students make a forecast before advancing.
